The **statistical regions of [Slovenia](/wiki/Slovenia "Slovenia")** are 12 administrative entities created in 2000 for legal and statistical purposes.

## Division

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Statistical_regions_of_Slovenia&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Division")]

By a decree in 2000, Slovenia has been divided into 12 statistical regions ([NUTS](/wiki/Nomenclature_of_Territorial_Units_for_Statistics "Nomenclature of Territorial Units for Statistics")-3 level), which are grouped in two cohesion regions (NUTS-2 level).[[1]](#cite_note-NUTS-1)

The statistical regions have been grouped into two cohesion regions are:

* **[Eastern Slovenia](/wiki/Eastern_Slovenia "Eastern Slovenia")** (*Vzhodna Slovenija* – SI01), which groups the Mura, Drava, Carinthia, Savinja, Central Sava, Lower Sava, Southeast Slovenia, and Littoral–Inner Carniola regions.
* **[Western Slovenia](/wiki/Western_Slovenia "Western Slovenia")** (*Zahodna Slovenija* – SI02), which groups the Central Slovenia, Upper Carniola, Gorizia, and Coastal–Karst regions.

| Statistical regions | | | | | |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| English name | Slovenian name | Code | Largest city | Area (km2) | Population (2025) |
| [Mura](/wiki/Mura_Statistical_Region "Mura Statistical Region") | *pomurska* | SI011 | [Murska Sobota](/wiki/Murska_Sobota "Murska Sobota") | 1,337 | 113,172 |
| [Drava](/wiki/Drava_Statistical_Region "Drava Statistical Region") | *podravska* | SI012 | [Maribor](/wiki/Maribor "Maribor") | 2,170 | 331,815 |
| [Carinthia](/wiki/Carinthia_Statistical_Region "Carinthia Statistical Region") | *koroška* | SI013 | [Slovenj Gradec](/wiki/Slovenj_Gradec "Slovenj Gradec") | 1,041 | 70,358 |
| [Savinja](/wiki/Savinja_Statistical_Region "Savinja Statistical Region") | *savinjska* | SI014 | [Celje](/wiki/Celje "Celje") | 2,301 | 262,814 |
| [Central Sava](/wiki/Central_Sava_Statistical_Region "Central Sava Statistical Region") | *zasavska* | SI015 | [Trbovlje](/wiki/Trbovlje "Trbovlje") | 485 | 57,083 |
| [Lower Sava](/wiki/Lower_Sava_Statistical_Region "Lower Sava Statistical Region") | *posavska* | SI016 | [Krško](/wiki/Kr%C5%A1ko "Krško") | 968 | 75,993 |
| [Southeast Slovenia](/wiki/Southeast_Slovenia_Statistical_Region "Southeast Slovenia Statistical Region") | *jugovzhodna Slovenija* | SI017 | [Novo Mesto](/wiki/Novo_Mesto "Novo Mesto") | 2,675 | 148,670 |
| [Littoral–Inner Carniola](/wiki/Littoral%E2%80%93Inner_Carniola_Statistical_Region "Littoral–Inner Carniola Statistical Region") | *primorsko-notranjska* | SI018 | [Postojna](/wiki/Postojna "Postojna") | 1,456 | 53,826 |
| [Central Slovenia](/wiki/Central_Slovenia_Statistical_Region "Central Slovenia Statistical Region") | *osrednjeslovenska* | SI021 | [Ljubljana](/wiki/Ljubljana "Ljubljana") | 2,334 | 569,475 |
| [Upper Carniola](/wiki/Upper_Carniola_Statistical_Region "Upper Carniola Statistical Region") | *gorenjska* | SI022 | [Kranj](/wiki/Kranj "Kranj") | 2,137 | 209,921 |
| [Gorizia](/wiki/Gorizia_Statistical_Region "Gorizia Statistical Region") | *goriška* | SI023 | [Nova Gorica](/wiki/Nova_Gorica "Nova Gorica") | 2,325 | 118,096 |
| [Coastal–Karst](/wiki/Coastal%E2%80%93Karst_Statistical_Region "Coastal–Karst Statistical Region") | *obalno-kraška* | SI024 | [Koper](/wiki/Koper "Koper") | 1,044 | 119,627 |
